title: Deploy companion on a header-capable free host
goal: Provide a repository-controlled free HTTPS deployment for the existing deterministic companion bundle that passes the complete security-header doctor and remains loadable inside authenticated Miro.

approval.note: Use only free hosting already authorized by the user. Preserve deterministic build digests, least privilege and real Miro readback. Do not enable paid plans or alter account recovery/MFA.

acceptance.assertion: The deployment is free, durable, repository-controlled and HTTPS-enforced.
Every deployed release file matches the deterministic build manifest exactly.
Real responses satisfy the complete release-doctor header contract without relying on repository-only _headers files.
Launcher and panel load inside authenticated Miro and read-only Web SDK calls still succeed.
GitHub Pages remains a documented fallback until the hardened host is independently proven.
